note: Separate from the curated -reference.json; merge in when wiring the single-file consumer.

items.title: Announcement in a classroom
items.announcement: Man: Good afternoon, everyone. I am excited to inform you that Dr. Cynthia Palmer, a renowned expert in environmental science, will be giving a guest lecture next Monday at 2 PM in Waldman Auditorium. Dr. Palmer will discuss the latest advancements in sustainable energy solutions and their impact on global climate change. Due to her popularity and the high interest in her work, I highly recommend arriving early to secure a seat.

options.B: A different location for a class

questions.stem: Why does the professor mention Dr. Palmer's popularity?

options.A: To encourage students to read her work
options.B: To indicate why she was invited to the university
options.C: To compare her to other invited experts
options.D: To explain why students should arrive early

items.title: Announcement in a student lounge
items.announcement: Man: Attention everyone! The student lounge will be closed tomorrow from one P.M. to three P.M. for maintenance. We will be repairing a broken pipe in the ceiling. We apologize for any inconvenience this may cause. Please plan accordingly and consider using the library or the campus caf� during this time.

questions.stem: What is the main purpose of the announcement?

options.A: To inform students about a schedule change
options.C: To notify students of a new facility
options.D: To encourage students to use the lounge more

questions.stem: What should students do during the closure?

items.title: Announcement at a university club meeting
items.announcement: Announcer: Welcome to the creative writing club's monthly meeting! Before we get started, I wanted to remind you of the guidelines for our upcoming short-story contest. We're looking for stories on the theme of family, and all stories must be submitted by the end of November to be considered. Good luck to everyone participating!

questions.stem: Why does the speaker mention family?

options.A: It is the topic of the story they are reading.
options.B: It was discussed at last month's meeting.
options.D: Families are invited to the next meeting.

questions.stem: What does the speaker encourage the participants to do?

items.title: Announcement on the campus radio station
items.announcement: Announcer: Good evening everyone. Just a friendly reminder that the university's annual charity auction will take place tomorrow at 7 P.M. in the Main Hall. All proceeds will go to local charities. We hope to see you there and appreciate your support!

questions.stem: What is the main topic of the announcement?
What does the speaker hope the listeners will do?
